title: Senior Doctor - Care Hospitals - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Care Hospitals - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Care Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Care Hospitals:
Care Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals!
